g.text: Versioning — a linear snapshot chain, walked with a tiny payload
MemoryDelta(since=2) — "what changed since X?" · upper bound is always HEAD
MemoryDiff(1, 3) — state(X) vs state(Y), git-diff hunks · both ends fixed
MemoryHistory(anchor) — one node's add/mod/rem trail across all snapshots (rollback-capable)
relations are a sideband — they never appear in this trail (see knowledge-graph)
